findings.description: s1 hints are missing `record-separator` and `file-type`, which are top-level configuration properties defined in the format definition code block. Users searching for these property names should land on s1.
findings.source_evidence: Source code block: `record-separator: "\r\n"  # 改行コード(crlf)` and `file-type:      "Fixed"` are present in the フォーマット定義ファイル section.

findings.description: s4 hints are missing `FileLayoutValidator`, which is a PascalCase inner class defined in the source code snippet for this section.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `private class FileLayoutValidator implements FileValidator {` appears in the ファイルバリデータ生成 section.
